messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: public_artifact_work
Attribute evidence_leverage: how much completing this work increases concrete falsifiable evidence for robust LLM list judgment

A (first_user_path): Compress the first-time user path into one obvious command, one tiny request file, one expected output, and one explanation of when cardinal ranking is worth its cost.

B (large_frozen_benchmark): Create a larger frozen benchmark suite with multiple task families, repeated runs, equalized budgets, raw artifacts, and a clear statistical report.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute? Choose one item ID. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","confidence":0.0}.
